title: Skill type definitions and descriptions for AI-UI system
purpose: Provides type definitions and metadata for skill transitions in the AI-UI system, used for displaying skill transitions in the UI.
module_context: Exports a SkillTransition interface and a constant object SKILL_DESCRIPTIONS containing descriptions for all available skills.

steps.content: Define a mapping of skill names to their descriptive text.
Provide descriptions for all available skills in the system.
